LoginGet Started

Features Built For UK Garages

Everything you need to turn MOT data into predictable revenue.

Instant DVSA Lookup

Access MOT history, mileage trends, and hidden advisories in seconds.

Automated Reminders

SMS and email reminders at 30, 14, and 7 days before expiry.

Revenue Recovery

Identify advisory work and turn it into booked jobs automatically.

Analytics Dashboard

Track conversions, revenue, and customer lifetime value in real time.

Customer CRM

Keep customer and vehicle history in one place with fast search.

Smart Quotes

Generate professional quotes from MOT advisories in minutes.

UK Compliance

Built for UK garages with GDPR-friendly workflows and data handling.

Time Savings

Automate follow-ups and reduce admin time without extra staff.

See Garage Boost in action

Start a free trial and experience automated reminders and smart quoting.

Start Free Trial
Garage Boost

The UK's leading MOT reminder and revenue recovery platform for garages.
